description: Authorized external vendor queries BigQuery from trusted network.
External vendor SA queries BigQuery from public IP (no access levels).
error_message: 403 VPC Service Controls: Ingress denied. Request from serviceAccount:vendor-analyst-sa@external-consulting-firm.iam.gserviceaccount.com to bigquery.googleapis.com/google.cloud.bigquery.v2.TableService.GetData is blocked. Missing required access level or resource binding.

description: External vendor SA attempts to access Vertex AI prediction APIs.
error_message: VPC Service Controls: Ingress denied. Request from serviceAccount:vendor-analyst-sa@external-consulting-firm.iam.gserviceaccount.com to aiplatform.googleapis.com/google.cloud.aiplatform.v1.PredictionService.Predict is blocked. Missing required access level or resource binding.
